info.name: Fund Transfer API Final
info.description:
Complete endpoint collection for the Fund Transfer API (PHP/Symfony). Base URL: http://localhost — adjust the `base_url` collection variable to match your Docker host/port.

Authentication: All `/api/*` routes require `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The fixture seed token is `test-api-key-fixture-00000000000001`.

Flow order for a fresh database:
1. Health Check — verify stack is up
2. Create Account (Alice / Bob) — note the returned `id` fields
3. Transfer — use Alice → Bob with a fresh `idempotency_key`
4. Inspect the transaction, list accounts, list transfers, etc.
5. Edge-case and error folders test validation, auth, and business rules.

item.name: Create Account – Test User, Zero bal

exec: // Generate a unique idempotency key so this request can be replayed

item.name: Create Transfer – Idempotent Replay (same key, same payload)
Create Transfer – idempotent Replay (same key, diff payload)
Create Transfer – new Idempotent key (diff key, diff payload)
Create Transfer – new Idempotent Replay (diff key, diff payload)
ACCOUNT – Deactivate account with non-zero balance → 422
TRANSFER – Currency mismatch (USD account → EUR amount) → 422
TRANSFER – Idempotency key reused with different payload → 409
TRANSFER – Rate limit: fire 20 rapid requests (expect eventual 429)

exec: // This fires once; run the request 20+ times quickly via Collection Runner
// to actually trigger the 429. The test here just captures the status.

variable.description: Auto-set by 'Create Account – Alice'. Paste manually if needed.
